# services.opensmtpd

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.opensmtpd`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.opensmtpd.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the OpenSMTPD server. |
| `services.opensmtpd.extraServerArgs` | `list of string` | Extra command line arguments provided when the smtpd process is started. |
| `services.opensmtpd.package` | `package` | The opensmtpd package to use. |
| `services.opensmtpd.procPackages` | `list of package` | Packages to search for filters, tables, queues, and schedulers. Add packages here if you want to use them as as such, for example from the opensmtpd-table-\* packages. |
| `services.opensmtpd.serverConfiguration` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | The contents of the smtpd.conf configuration file. See the OpenSMTPD documentation for syntax information. |
| `services.opensmtpd.setSendmail` | `boolean` | Whether to set the system sendmail to OpenSMTPD's. |
